ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_storage_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy storage system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy storage system */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the energy storage system in kWh */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of energy storage system (e.g., lithium-ion, lead-acid) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the energy storage system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was installed */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the system ends */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the energy storage system */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solar_panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar panel */,
  "panel_name" TEXT /* Name of the solar panel */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the solar panel in kW */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the solar panel as a percentage */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the solar panel */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the panel was installed */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the panel ends */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the solar panel */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid connection */,
  "connection_name" TEXT /* Name of the grid connection */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the grid connection in kW */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the grid connection in V */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the grid connection */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the connection was installed */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the connection ends */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the grid service provider */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy data point */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy storage system */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid connection */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the energy data point */,
  "solar" REAL /* Solar energy production in W */,
  "grid_ie" REAL /* Grid energy usage in W */,
  "pilot" REAL /* Pilot signal */,
  "charge_power" REAL /* Charge power in W */,
  "min_charge_power" REAL /* Minimum charge power in W */,
  "state" INTEGER /* State of charge as a percentage */,
  "smoothed_available" REAL /* Smoothed available energy in kWh */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of data collection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of data collection */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition at the time of data collection (e.g., sunny, cloudy) */,
  "battery_voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the battery */,
  "battery_current" REAL /* Current of the battery */,
  "grid_voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the grid connection */,
  "grid_current" REAL /* Current of the grid connection */,
  "solar_voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the solar panel */,
  "solar_current" REAL /* Current of the solar panel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES energy_storage_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES grid_connections ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, operator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm event */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy storage system */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the alarm event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alarm event (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the alarm has been resolved (0 or 1) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who resolved the alarm */,
  "resolved_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the alarm was resolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the alarm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES energy_storage_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy storage system */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., kW, kWh) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES energy_storage_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log event */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy storage system */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the log event */,
  "event" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., alarm, warning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the log event */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log event (e.g., info, error) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the log event (e.g., system, user) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or context about the log event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES energy_storage_systems ("system_id")
)
